query: SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME, CONSTRAINT_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'claims' AND CONSTRAINT_NAME LIKE '%source_document%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME, CONSTRAINT_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'claims' AND CONSTRAINT_NAME LIKE '%source_document%';
